summary: Added a data-reactive Signal Core that ties the hero readout and ambient canvas field to selected lane, feed playback, lane colors, map position, blockers, outcomes, and traces.

queries: dashboard ambient motion data visualization UI design best practices
game UI particle effects progress dashboard interaction design
prefers-reduced-motion animation dashboard UX best practices
pattern_notes: Dashboard visuals should help communicate dense system state instead of acting as isolated decoration.
Game UI motion feels meaningful when it gives concrete feedback about focus, progress, pressure, or reward.
Motion should be treated as an enhancement and reduced when a user requests reduced motion.

ui_contract: The hero Signal Core displays the selected or playback lane, current mode, level, pressure meter, and unlock meter.
The fixed canvas field derives particle colors, focus point, and intensity from the same motion signal.
Feed playback changes the signal mode to playback and shifts focus to the event lane.
Selecting another lane updates the hero readout and body motion theme without changing snapshot data.
The JavaScript canvas loop and CSS animations respect prefers-reduced-motion.

checks.result: Signal Core rendered in the hero with a 1163x91 bounding box, body motion mode set to gated, canvas sized to 1280x800, and no horizontal overflow.

Deep-linked prediction_market_research route rendered Signal Core text for Prediction Market Research, motion mode unlock, lane colors #9a89ff and #44d7c9, 390x920 canvas, one-column Signal Core layout, no horizontal overflow, and screenshot sample contained 256 unique byte values.
Deep-linked prediction_market_research route rendered Signal Core with three-column layout, unlock motion mode, 1280x800 canvas, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.
Deep-linked prediction_market_research route rendered Signal Core with three-column layout, unlock motion mode, 1600x900 canvas, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.
Clicking mission feed playback changed body motion mode to playback, changed the playback button text to II, and updated Signal Core text to the active playback lane.
